home.title: Who feeds Algeria — and from where?
home.subtitle: Over 9,900 import permits issued by the Ministry of Agriculture. We extracted them, structured them, and visualised them so you can understand the dependency chains behind your food.

chapters.ch1_lead: Seeds, seedlings, and fruit origins mapped by supplier country.
chapters.ch2_lead: Who imports pesticides, what active substances are approved, and where they come from.
chapters.ch3_lead: Market concentration: which companies hold the most licenses across all sectors.
chapters.ch4_lead: Veterinary medicine distribution and geographic coverage by wilaya.

newsletter.title: 📬 Stay in the Loop
newsletter.desc: Subscribe to our newsletter for future data analysis projects and insights from ta9in.

footer.source: Source: Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development
